case_title: KELLY LAMONTE VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LAMONTE, KELLY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAMONTE, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LAMONTE, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-05-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KELLY LAMONTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-16-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KELLY LAMONTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. .CONTINUED FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO SUPPLY THE COURT WITH EVIDENCE SUPPORTING HER CLAIM AND FOR DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE THE LOG OF SWEEPS, FOR APRIL 6TH 2022, FROM DPW AND SFPD. CONTACT INFORMATION WAS SWAPPED BETWEEN PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2023 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF KELLY LAMONTE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES JAVIER BREMOND. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) WITH WITNESS ERIC GUAJARDO (CCSF DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS, SUPERVISOR). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMONTE, KELLY

ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMONTE, KELLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEFENDANT PRODUCED EVIDENCE OF ALL DPW LOGS FOR SERVICE FOR PLAINTIFF'S 4-6-22 AT LOCATION SHOTWELL & 26TH. THERE WAS NO WORK PERFORMED ON THAT DATE OR LOCATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
